prompt: The JFrame is blank — no button appears. What is the bug?
choices: JButton must be added to a JPanel before being added to a JFrame
Components added to a visible frame are not automatically repainted; add the component before setVisible(true), or call frame.revalidate() and frame.repaint() after adding
setSize must be called after add() for the layout to calculate correctly
JFrame uses BorderLayout by default and cannot contain a JButton directly
explanation: Adding a component after setVisible(true) requires a revalidate/repaint cycle to update the display. The button is added but the frame doesn't know it needs to redraw. Fix: either add the button before setVisible(true), or call frame.revalidate(); frame.repaint(); after adding.
